task: Parse an AWS CloudFormation template and extract all resource logical IDs and their types
solution_criteria: Function should read a CloudFormation JSON template, return a dictionary mapping logical IDs to resource types. Should handle nested resources and validate JSON structure.

task: Create a JSON IAM policy that allows read-only access to S3 buckets with names starting with 'data-'
solution_criteria: Valid IAM policy JSON with appropriate principals, actions (GetObject, ListBucket), and resource ARN patterns. Should follow AWS policy structure with Effect, Action, and Resource fields.

task: Write a regex pattern to validate AWS S3 bucket names according to AWS naming rules
solution_criteria: Pattern should enforce: 3-63 characters, lowercase letters/numbers/hyphens only, start and end with letter or number, no consecutive hyphens. Should pass valid names like 'my-bucket-123' and reject invalid ones like 'My-Bucket' or 'my--bucket'.
